command: # SYNTHETIC: reconstructed from stdout capture of /tmp/exp_160.py 1024 after bench.py's client_timeout=600 default rejected these long-tail runs (p95 approached 1400-2600 s wall per request). Per-request CSV NOT available.
notes: SYNTHETIC aggregate JSON: the request-level data for this profile was collected with an auxiliary diagnostic script (/tmp/exp_160.py) not bench.py, because bench.py's per-request httpx timeout of 600 s was shorter than the p95 observed on this profile under voxcpm hotcold. The aggregate metrics are accurate (verified by the hot worker's X-Route counts: server-side routes match what the client recorded); the raw-per-request CSV is NOT available and reproduction of the p50/p95 from first principles requires rerunning bench.py with --client-timeout 3600.
